# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: projects/dm-templates-prod
  name: dm_templates_prod

resources:
# Compute Engine Instance
- name: myInstance
  type: dm_templates_prod.py-compute-engine
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: n1-standard-1
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT_DISK
     boot: true
     autoDelete: true
     initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-9
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default

# Cloud SQL Instance
- name: mySqlInstance
  type: dm_templates_prod.py-sql-server
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
    databases:
    - name: mydb

# Cloud Storage Bucket
- name: myBucket
  type: dm_templates_prod.py-storage-bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

# Load Balancer
- name: myLoadBalancer
  type: dm_templates_prod.py-compute-engine-v1beta2-httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    requestPath: /healthcheck
